reading list
A small collection of essays and books I wholeheartedly recommend.
books I read this year or have open in my room somewhere
Henry and June
Anaïs Nin
From Third World to First
Lee Kuan Yew
Pictures from Brueghel
William Carlos Williams
Wuthering Heights
Emily Brontë
Never Let Me Go
Kazuo Ishiguro
Middlemarch
George Eliot
The Ersatz Elevator
Lemony Snicket
Chez toi en France
G. Brame and B. Tollu
Ella Enchanted
Gail Carson Levine
A Man Without a Country
Kurt Vonnegut
Anne's House of Dreams
Lucy Maud Montgomery
To the Lighthouse
Virginia Woolf
